lore:quest.name: Embers of the Forge
lore:quest.description: Brenna Ironsong's forge has gone cold, and a village without a forge cannot survive a siege. Gather 16 iron ingots so she can relight it and arm Elderfall's defenders.
steps: Speak with Brenna Ironsong at the forge and accept the quest.
Gather 16 iron ingots by mining, smelting, or trade.
Return to Brenna and turn in the ingots through her dialogue.
